name: Bijendra Singh
profileSummary:
Chaudhary Bijendra Singh is an Indian politician. He stood for the 2004 Lok Sabha elections on the Indian National Congress ticket and became a Member of Parliament from Aligarh.
He is the resident of village Dhonda near Iglas Tehsil. He had also been five times MLA from Iglas, Aligarh. He is standing again for the Samajwadi Party in the 2024 Lok Sabha elections.
